title: woodsia hyperborea var. glabella
intro: Woodsia hyperborea var. glabella, also known as the alpine woodsia or glabella woodsia fern, is a rare and unique fern species that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Woodsia hyperborea var. glabella include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and its extracts can be used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
